report_name: Linux Foundation Launches 'Akrites' Framework to Secure Open Source from AI Threats

attack_patterns.name: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools
attack_patterns.description: The Akrites framework was created to address the threat of AI-accelerated discovery and exploitation of vulnerabilities in open-source software dependencies and development tools, which represents a supply chain compromise risk.

identities.name: Linux Foundation
identities.description: Announced the formation of Akrites, a cross-industry initiative to bolster the security of the open-source software ecosystem.

identities.name: Akrites
identities.description: A cross-industry security framework and initiative to create a unified process for vulnerability disclosure and remediation in critical open-source software, in response to AI-accelerated threats.

identities.name: Google
identities.description: A founding member and backer of the Akrites initiative.

identities.name: Microsoft
identities.description: A founding member and backer of the Akrites initiative.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: A founding member and backer of the Akrites initiative, representing leading AI firms.

identities.description: A founding member and backer of the Akrites initiative.

identities.description: A founding member of the Akrites initiative, representing cloud providers.

identities.description: A founding member of the Akrites initiative, representing leading AI firms.

identities.description: A founding member of the Akrites initiative, representing hardware manufacturers.

identities.description: A founding member of the Akrites initiative, representing security vendors.

identities.name: Cisco
identities.description: A founding member of the Akrites initiative, representing security vendors.

identities.name: Citi

identities.name: Open Source Security Foundation (OpenSSF)
identities.description: An existing open-source security effort that the Akrites framework will build upon.

identities.name: Alpha-Omega project
identities.description: An existing open-source security project that the Akrites framework will build upon.
